rules: Every asset must map to a route, component, product moment, and launch purpose.
No orphan assets. No loose files. Every paid or generated asset must be entered here before integration.
Launch-critical assets must always have an existing fallback.

assets.name: URAI Home World Core Environment
assets.purpose: Default 3D spatial landing world for URAI. Replaces dashboard/card feeling with an explorable premium threshold world.
assets.notes: First spend bucket. Needs navigable terrain, sky framing, branded hero composition.

assets.name: Walkable Ground Terrain
assets.purpose: Reachable ground environment below the default world for real-life systems, helpers, and grounded action.
assets.notes: Must feel physically reachable from Home, not a separate page.

assets.name: Galaxy / Life Map Sky Dome
assets.purpose: Galaxy sky dome for Life Map memory stars, constellation depth, and upward-looking spatial navigation.
assets.notes: Must read as looking up into the life-map sky.

assets.name: Portal System: Ground, Life Map, Focus, Replay
assets.purpose: Reusable portal kit connecting Home, Ground, Life Map, Focus, Replay, Passport, and Status as world transitions.
assets.notes: Portal interaction must feel like spatial travel, not a flat button.

assets.name: Memory Star Node Model
assets.purpose: Selectable star node model that can open a memory interior and drive Focus/Replay transitions.
assets.notes: Needs hover, tap, selected, and opened states.

assets.name: Star Hover / Tap Feedback FX
assets.purpose: Visual feedback for star hover/tap/selection, including glow, pulse, label reveal, and camera target cue.
assets.notes: Can start as procedural config before final VFX assets.

assets.name: Focus Star-Entry Tunnel
assets.purpose: Cinematic camera tunnel that makes Focus feel like flying into a selected memory star.
assets.notes: Must connect from selected star to memory chamber.

assets.name: Memory Chamber Interior
assets.purpose: Interior space inside a star where a selected memory opens around the user.
assets.notes: Foundation for memory reading and replay entry.

assets.name: Replay Film Object
assets.purpose: Spatial memory-film object that anchors Replay as an object inside the star world.
assets.notes: Should feel like opening a memory film, not pressing play on a normal page.

assets.name: Cinematic Loading World
assets.purpose: Loading state with spatial depth, branded atmospheric motion, and safe fallback messaging.
assets.notes: No blank/generic loading. Mobile first frame must look intentional.

assets.name: Passport / Status Room Layer
assets.purpose: World-layer room/control surface for Passport and Status rather than admin/dashboard pages.
assets.notes: Also mapped to /status as a shared room-layer kit.

assets.name: Particle / Light Trail System
assets.purpose: Reusable particle/light trail system connecting portals, stars, Focus, Replay, and final pullback motion.
assets.notes: Prefer procedural config first; upgrade with paid particles later.
